shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,L,W,L. value_profile_cmplog RESOLVES; value_profile AND naive BLOCK; cmplog NON-decisive. The winner is the only arm carrying I2SRandReplace that is also decisive here (the resolve is attributed to the I2S inside vpc), so this is an i2s-pro shape whose winner is vpc rather than plain cmplog.

hypotheses.label: vpc resolves an exact-literal equality gate because its I2SRandReplace splices the logged comparand literal into a fixed input offset, which value_profile's Hamming/CMP_MAP gradient cannot land

params.arm_repointing: THIS SHAPE'S WINNER IS vpc, NOT cmplog. operand_enrichment as built computes cmplog-vs-naive log2 enrichment. Repoint it to measure the SAME byte_freq_ratio on the vpc-RESOLVING corpus (the I2S-bearing winner) vs the union of the value_profile- and naive-BLOCKING corpora (the non-I2S losers). signed_target_enrich = log2( freq(target literal byte @ gate offset in vpc corpus) / freq(same byte in vp+naive corpora) ). This is a PARAM change (which corpus dirs feed W vs L), not a new tool: the measurement, metrics, and gate-offset extraction are identical.
params.gate_offset_source: per-branch W/L decisive seed bytes already in db/blockers.sqlite (resolving_seeds vs blocking_seeds); the gate offset + target literal come from the branch's operand_literal / byte diff, exactly as the validated harfbuzz/5391 anchor.
params.scope: scored ONLY for targets with on-disk corpora: harfbuzz (38), curl (6) here -> 44/90 branches measurable. lcms (36), libxml2 (7), bloaty (2), libpng (1) = 46 branches have no on-disk corpus (data_reality) and fall to fallback:inconclusive for the evidence-confirmation guardrail, though they still carry the shape's Layer-1 label.

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 (strictly): the exact target literal at the gate offset is MORE frequent in the vpc-resolving corpus than in the vp/naive-blocking corpora, because only the I2S-bearing winner can place the all-or-nothing constant. An ALTERNATIVE mechanism predicts differently: if vpc resolved via value_profile's gradient alone (not I2S substitution), the literal would accrete byte-by-byte in the value_profile corpus too and signed_target_enrich would be ~0 (no winner-over-loser enrichment, since vp is a loser arm). If vpc resolved by some structural/length route rather than landing THIS literal, the tool returns no_gate_signature. So a positive sign is a discriminating confirmation of I2S literal substitution, not merely of 'vpc wins'.
hypotheses.rule_notes: Threshold 1.0 (>=2x relative frequency, log2) is conservative vs the validated pro median of +3.12 at the operand_enrichment anchor; > 0 alone is the falsifiable boundary, 1.0 guards against corpus-frequency noise.

data_realities_respected: No seed_lineage 'I2S event' descriptor used (I2S is untagged in mutation_op) — confirmation is via corpus byte-frequency, the only observable of I2S substitution.

No byte-alignment claimed on structural-assembly gates: this shape's members are FIXED-OFFSET VALUE gates (exact literal at a known offset), which operand_enrichment is built for; the structural-assembly/joint_necessity path is NOT used here (that is the LLWL/vpc>both joint shape, a different family).
on-disk corpora exist only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -> only the 44 curl+harfbuzz branches are evidence-scorable; lcms/libxml2/bloaty/libpng (46) -> fallback inconclusive.
notes: MERGE: the two prior v2 clusters (i2s_binary_format_magic_gate n=77 + i2s_text_token_exact_match n=13) collapse to ONE hypothesis. Every signature describes the identical technique-effect: I2SRandReplace logs the exact comparand (4-byte FOURCC / sfnt-tag / PNG chunk-type / numeric sentinel / ASCII keyword / single escape byte) and splices it at the comparison offset, satisfying an equality/switch/presence gate that value_profile's Hamming-distance bucket only nudges toward. Binary-magic vs text-token differs only in literal WIDTH and charset (4-byte binary vs multi-byte ASCII vs 1-byte control char) — NOT in mechanism. No real-data measurement can discriminate 'binary FOURCC substitution' from 'ASCII keyword substitution': both produce the same observable (target literal enriched at the gate offset in the I2S-bearing corpus), so keeping them separate would be a distinction the data cannot support. The single-byte members (curl_263, libxml2_6643/6809, lcms_2130, harfbuzz where width=1) are the SAME mechanism at width 1; the off-gradient single-byte case is still an I2S substitution, so the enrichment test applies unchanged (signed_target_enrich is per-offset, width-agnostic). ARM REPOINTING is the load-bearing caveat: because the winner is vpc (not cmplog), operand_enrichment must be parameterized to take W=vpc-resolving corpus, L=vp+naive-blocking corpora — same byte_freq_ratio computation, repointed corpus dirs. G2 (independence): the test does NOT re-use 'vpc resolves' to confirm 'vpc resolves' — it measures byte-frequency of a specific literal at a specific offset in the saved corpora, an observable orthogonal to the resolve-pattern that defined the shape; a non-I2S winner would show no enrichment. CAVEAT/coverage: 46/90 branches (lcms 36, libxml2 7, bloaty 2, libpng 1) lack on-disk corpora and cannot be evidence-confirmed -> fallback inconclusive for those; the dominant scorable mass is harfbuzz (38, font table-tag/sfnt-magic FOURCCs — the same surface as the validated harfbuzz/5391 anchor) plus curl (6, HTTP/header tokens). TARGETS: harfbuzz, curl (scorable); lcms, libxml2, bloaty, libpng (label-only).
